mapper.sql: id, name, type, target_parts, description, size_bytes, md5, uploader, uploaded_at, storage_path
mapper.select: SELECT FROM operation_package WHERE md5 = #{md5} LIMIT 1
mapper.update:
UPDATE operation_package
name = #{name}, type = #{type},
target_parts = #{targetParts, typeHandler=com.zioneer.robotqcsystem.mapper.typehandler.JsonPackagePartListTypeHandler},
description = #{description}, size_bytes = #{sizeBytes}, md5 = #{md5}, uploader = #{uploader}, uploaded_at = #{uploadedAt}, storage_path = #{storagePath},
WHERE id = #{id}
